build.buildCommand: mkdir -p out/classes && find src -name '*.java' > sources.txt && javac -cp lib/sqlite-jdbc.jar -d out/classes @sources.txt && cp -r src/main/resources/static out/classes/ && cd out/classes && jar xf ../../lib/sqlite-jdbc.jar && cd ../.. && jar --create --file=examportal.jar --main-class=com.examportal.server.ExamServer -C out/classes .
